title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Jindal Steel & Power

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Jindal Steel & Power
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Plant Manager with drive and ambition, Jindal Steel & Power in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Jindal Steel & Power:
Jindal Steel & Power is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Six Sigma

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power!
